name: Robert Blue
background: Robert M. Blue is chair, president and chief executive officer of Dominion Energy. He has served as president and chief executive officer since October 2020 and was elected chair of the board in April 2021. Blue joined Dominion Energy in 2005 and has held a succession of executive roles.

company_affiliations.name: Dominion Energy, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Chair of the Board of Directors
